notes: Pirate bands polish: every crew now has a personality — 🤑 Greedy, 🛡️ Loyal, ⚔️ Bold, 🦊 Cunning, ⚖️ Honorable — that shapes the loot cut they demand, their hire fee, how readily they desert, and how hard they fight. Bands can hold blood feuds: rivals refuse to serve together, and siding with one angers the other. Beat a pirate crew down and you can now Spare them for a big standing boost instead of finishing them. And a greedy/cunning turncoat no longer just bolts — it makes off with one of your freighters.
